project_privacy_data_flows.data_type: All Encrypted Note Data + User Token
project_privacy_data_flows.description: Synchronizes encrypted note data between local device and api.notesnook.com. Triggered on login, manually, and via background fetch. Data encrypted end-to-end before transmission.

flow_steps.code: await db.sync({ type: type, force: forced, offlineMode: SettingsService.get().offlineMode });
flow_steps.details: Sync triggered by user action, login completion, or background fetch. Supports full and partial sync modes.

flow_steps.code: const status = await BackgroundFetch.configure({ minimumFetchInterval: 15, enableHeadless: true, startOnBoot: true, stopOnTerminate: false, requiredNetworkType: BackgroundFetch.NETWORK_TYPE_ANY }, onEvent, onTimeout);
flow_steps.details: Background fetch configured with 15-minute minimum interval. Runs as headless JS task on Android.
On device boot, foreground service started to restore notifications, pinned notes, and start background sync.

flow_steps.code: await Notifications.setupReminders(); if (SettingsService.get().notifNotes) { Notifications.pinQuickNote(); } Notifications.restorePinnedNotes(); NotePreviewWidget.updateNotes();
flow_steps.details: Headless JS task restores reminders, pinned notes, and updates widgets on boot.
All sync data transmitted to api.notesnook.com over HTTPS. Data already encrypted client-side before transmission.
Server-Sent Events endpoint for real-time sync notifications from server.
Foreground service permission for background sync operations.
